filter_descriptions.few_distance_5: 5-point subsets where all 10 squared distances are forced into a single class by kite identity + row equalities; obstruction = pairwise-equidistant 5-tuple impossible in R^2
filter_descriptions.kite_identity: linear system on squared distances using witness-row equalities and rhombus kite identity 4 X_{x,a} = X_{x,y} + X_{a,b}; obstruction = forced zero squared distance
filter_descriptions.kite_row_collapse: forced-equal-radius equivalence classes from mutual phi 2-cycles (kite identity gives r_x = r_y)
filter_descriptions.row_chord_order: row-internal chord-order violations: kite-identity forces two chords within one row equal but their angular gaps (in the supplied cyclic order) differ; L7 monotonicity forbids equal lengths
filter_descriptions.triple_shared_witness: labels v shared by >=3 mutual phi 2-cycles (informational; potential rank-2 contradiction in plane)
